Comparison

SpiniX vs Belly

Both use gamification for customer loyalty. But one is built for enterprise, the other for independent restaurants.

Updated February 2025

SpiniX vs Belly: quick verdict

Choose SpiniX if:

  • You're an independent restaurant or small chain
  • You want simple setup (15 minutes, not weeks)
  • Budget is under €100/month
  • You need Google review generation built-in

Choose Belly if:

  • You're a large chain (50+ locations)
  • You need tablet-based check-in hardware
  • You have dedicated IT support
  • Enterprise features are a priority

SpiniX vs Belly loyalty: feature comparison

FeatureSpiniXBelly
Starting Price €29/month $129/month + hardware
Setup Time 15 minutes 1-2 weeks
Hardware Required No (QR codes only) Yes (tablet)
Gamification Spin wheel Points + prizes
Google Review Generation Built-in (33% rate) Not included
Email Automation Yes (3-email sequence) Yes
Customer Data Capture 46% opt-in Varies by setup
App Download Required No No (tablet check-in)
Multi-location Support Yes (Growth plan) Yes
POS Integration No Yes (major POS)
Best For SMB restaurants Enterprise chains

No hardware costs. No setup fees.

  • • 1 tablet
  • • Basic rewards

Pro $179/mo

  • • Custom integrations

Plus $300-500 tablet hardware per location.

SpiniX vs Belly loyalty: detailed breakdown

Approach to Gamification

Both SpiniX and Belly use gamification, but differently. Belly uses a points-based system where customers check in via tablet and earn points toward prizes. SpiniX uses instant-win spin wheels - customers scan a QR code and immediately win a prize. The instant gratification approach typically drives higher engagement.

Hardware & Setup

Belly requires a dedicated tablet at each location for customer check-in, plus initial setup and training. SpiniX is entirely QR-based - print codes, place them on tables, and you're live in 15 minutes.

Review Generation

SpiniX has Google review generation built into the core flow - customers are prompted for reviews right after winning (33% leave reviews). Belly focuses on loyalty and doesn't include review generation.

Best Use Case

Belly is designed for established chains with IT resources. SpiniX is built for independent restaurants who want results without complexity.

SpiniX vs Belly: performance data

MetricSpiniXCompetitor
Average Enrollment Rate46%~30%
Setup Time15 min1-2 weeks
Monthly Cost (1 location)€29$129+
Review Generation33%N/A

SpiniX vs Belly loyalty: FAQ

Is Belly still operating?

Belly was acquired by Mobivity in 2018. The product still exists but has shifted toward enterprise customers with larger budgets.

Can I switch from Belly to SpiniX?

Yes. Since SpiniX is QR-based, you can run both systems simultaneously during transition.

Which has better customer support?

SpiniX offers direct founder support for all plans. Belly support varies by plan tier.

Ready to Try SpiniX?

See why independent restaurants choose SpiniX over enterprise solutions.
